rationale: Review 1 correctly identifies that `BialgHom.map_antipode`, `Bialgebra.TensorProduct.map_id`, and `map_comp` are all marked `private` despite being general results other TauCeti files would want to reuse — directly verifiable in the diff. Review 2 approves without noticing this gap; acting on it leaves those helpers inaccessible to the rest of the project, which is the decisive reuse defect for this rubric.
